home.heading: Rolls-Royce Car Rental Dubai: Chauffeur-Driven Luxury From AED 3,800/Day
home.quickAnswer: Rolls-Royce Dubai rents the full fleet from AED 3,800/day, chauffeur-driven or self-drive, with free delivery across Dubai and 24/7 WhatsApp booking.
keyFacts: Daily rates from AED 3,800: Ghost 3,800, Wraith 5,000, Dawn 5,500, Phantom 5,800, Cullinan 6,500, Spectre 7,500; hourly from AED 800 (2-hr minimum), with weekly and monthly discounts.
Choose chauffeur-driven service or self-drive (for qualifying renters), with free delivery across Downtown, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, JBR, Business Bay, DIFC and beyond.
Covers weddings, corporate, airport transfer (DXB & DWC meet & greet), events, photoshoots, city tours and long-term rentals.
Book 24/7 on WhatsApp/phone +971 55 816 4922 or email info@rollsroycers.com; service in English, Arabic and Russian.
body: Looking for Rolls-Royce car rental in Dubai? Naqra FZE puts the full fleet at your service, from the Ghost at AED 3,800/day and Cullinan at AED 6,500 to the all-electric Spectre at AED 7,500. Every booking includes a professional chauffeur and free delivery anywhere across Dubai, so your car arrives exactly where you need it.

Whether it is a wedding, a Downtown Dubai photoshoot, a business meeting in DIFC, or a smooth airport pickup, we tailor the journey to you. Book your Rolls-Royce rental in minutes over WhatsApp, 24/7, with multilingual support and transparent daily pricing. No hidden fees, just effortless luxury on the move.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to rent a Rolls-Royce in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Rolls-Royce rental in Dubai starts at AED 3,800/day for the Ghost. The Wraith is AED 5,000, Dawn AED 5,500, Phantom AED 5,800, Cullinan AED 6,500 and the electric Spectre AED 7,500 per day. All rates include a professional chauffeur and free delivery across Dubai.

faqs.question: Can tourists rent a Rolls-Royce in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Tourists can rent a Rolls-Royce in Dubai with a valid passport and either an International Driving Permit or, in most cases, by choosing our chauffeur option so no UAE licence is needed. We deliver to your hotel free of charge.

faqs.question: Do you offer Rolls-Royce rental with a driver in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. Every Rolls-Royce can be booked with a professional, multilingual chauffeur. Chauffeur-driven hire is ideal for weddings, airport transfers and VIP days out, with hourly, daily and monthly rates available.

faqs.question: Is free delivery included with Rolls-Royce hire in Dubai?
faqs.answer: Yes. We offer free delivery and collection across Dubai, including Downtown, Marina, Palm Jumeirah, DIFC, Business Bay and both DXB and DWC airports, 24/7.

faqs.question: Where can I rent a Rolls-Royce near me in Dubai?
faqs.answer: We serve all of Dubai and deliver to your location. Whether you are near Burj Khalifa, Dubai Marina, JBR or Palm Jumeirah, message us on WhatsApp at +971 55 816 4922 and we will bring the car to you.
